sharedInstructions: Use the market CLI first. Record unclear taxonomy, missing metadata, weak entry wording, and any place where the guide would confuse a low-capability AI.

tasks.name: Search Category Review
tasks.prompt: Use `a2b market update`, then inspect the `search` category through the market CLI. Evaluate whether the category structure and entry summaries are clear enough for a low-capability AI. Write a report that names any ambiguous wording and suggests one concrete improvement.

tasks.name: External Tool Entry Review
tasks.prompt: Use the market CLI to inspect the `multimedia/yt-dlp` entry. Evaluate whether the entry clearly explains that it is an external tool reference rather than an A2B built-in capability. Write a report with any confusion points and one suggested wording fix.
